# Mairu

Opinionated semantically aware coding agent that lifts rocks.

## Features

- **Coding agent** – Go-based CLI and TUI for AI-assisted development
- **Context server** – Centralised context management with vector search
- **Unified dashboard** – Svelte-based web UI for monitoring and control
- **PII redaction** – Built-in log stream sanitisation
- **Browser extension** – Web content extraction for context

## Quick start

```bash
./bootstrap.sh
make mairu-build
mairu setup
mairu init --defaults
```
